Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS

light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Fix stuck runs — await executor instead of fire-and-forget

Vercel kills serverless functions after response is sent, so the
background Promise.race pattern left runs stuck as "running" forever.
Now awaits the full run with maxDuration=120s.

commit.message:
fix(vpn): strip DNS from WireGuard configs to avoid resolvconf dependency

wg-quick fails with 'resolvconf: command not found' when DNS is set
in the config. Since we use the VM's existing DNS resolver for scanning
and don't want to alter VM DNS settings, remove DNS lines from generated
configs and strip them when copying to /etc/wireguard/wg0.conf.

commit.message:
Add parts readiness column to QB Open Orders in Jobs tab

New batch endpoint /api/scheduling/qb/parts-readiness-batch returns
readiness for all open sales orders in one call by cross-referencing:
- QB item receipt lines (parts received)
- QB items inventory (qty on hand)
- Manual overrides (available/not_needed)

Replaces the memo column with a colored progress bar showing X/Y parts
ready (green >=80%, orange >=50%, red <50%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Force IPv4 DNS resolution to fix Railway UDP voice handshake failure

The Discord voice connection loops signalling→connecting without reaching
Ready because Railway's container NAT drops IPv6 UDP. --dns-result-order=ipv4first
forces Node to resolve Discord's voice servers to IPv4 addresses, which
Railway routes correctly.

fix: ×ボタン動作修正・チュートリアルボタンテキスト復元

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: close mobile sidebar on route navigation (#479)

* feat: OIDC/SSO use state parameter instead of redirect

Use fixed callback URL (no query params) so IdPs can register the exact
redirect URI without wildcards. redirectTo is passed via the OIDC state
parameter instead, complying with providers that do not allow wildcards.

- Add OIDCStateStoreWithRedirectOnRequest to attach redirectTo from state to request
- Update oidc.guard to build fixed callback URL and pass redirectTo in state
- Update sso.controller and account-linking filter to read redirectTo from state
- Update docs for OIDC redirect URI configuration

Fixes ATT-250

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* refactor: address Sourcery PR feedback

- Extract getRedirectToFromRequest helper to centralize redirectTo resolution
- Add isOIDCAppState type guard before passing state to Passport
- Strengthen redirectTo type check in state store (require non-empty string)

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* feat: address pr review skill

* feat: add deploy PR to Coolify skill and workflow

- Add deploy-pr-to-coolify skill for local CLI deployment
- Add GitHub workflow with manual and /deploy comment triggers
- Supports PR image tag pr-{number}-{sha} and Coolify app update + deploy

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* fix: restrict deploy workflow to DEPLOY_ALLOWED_USERS only

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* fix: update sso controller spec import to use oidc-cookie-state-store

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: preserve undefined options in OIDC strategy authenticate override

When no request keys (callback URL or state) are set, pass through the
original options reference instead of spreading into a new object.
Fixes CI test expecting undefined to stay undefined.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: document OIDC state parameter for redirect and troubleshooting

The OIDC flow now uses the state parameter instead of callback URL query
params to carry the post-login redirect destination. Update OIDC setup
docs (EN/DE) with a note about exact callback URL matching and state
parameter requirements. Add FAQ entries for when the IdP doesn't
round-trip the state parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: remove stale docs-v2 folder

The docs-v2 content was already merged into docs/ and is a duplicate.
Remove the leftover folder to avoid confusion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: stop leaking user object in SSO redirect URL

The finalizeLogin method was appending the entire user object
(including tokens, NFC seed, email, etc.) as a query parameter on
the redirect URL. The session cookie is already set before the
redirect, so the frontend authenticates via the cookie — the user
query param was never consumed. Remove it to prevent sensitive data
exposure in URLs, browser history, and server logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use relative paths in docsify config for /docs prefix compatibility

The docs index.html used absolute paths (starting with /) for basePath,
logo, and cover background image. When served under /docs/ prefix in the
Docker container (via ServeStaticModule), docsify requested /en/home.md
instead of /docs/en/home.md, causing raw XML/404 errors. Switch all
paths to relative (./) so they resolve correctly regardless of the
serving prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: compute docsify basePath dynamically from page location

The previous relative path fix (./lang/) still resolved against the
site root because the browser sees /docs as a file, not a directory.
Now basePath is computed from window.location.pathname with a trailing
slash guarantee, so /docs/ + lang/ = /docs/lang/ in Docker and
/ + lang/ = /lang/ on GitHub Pages. Logo and cover background image
also use the computed base.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: close mobile sidebar on route navigation

Resolves ATT-247

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove unnecessary browser width check

---------

commit.message:
Remove attention monkey-patch, keep only NaN position fix

was trained on. Keep broken stride trick (matching S1 cache build)
and just fix the NaN positions. With all-bin mean-pool this should
now produce embeddings compatible with the trained S1 head.

commit.message:
feat: learning path, datetime-types concept, and expanded resources (Phase 6)

Adds /learn — a curated 8-step Start Here learning path with a visual stepper linking to core concept pages. Adds datetime-types.mdx covering M's five temporal types, conversion functions, duration arithmetic, and common pitfalls. commit.message:
Revamp header, nav dropdowns, research filters, and blog cards (#791)

* Revamp header, footer, nav dropdowns, research filters, and blog cards

Visual quality upgrade across key UI surfaces:
- Header/footer: soft left-to-right teal gradient
- Nav items: pill-style hover effects, Apple-style animated dropdowns
- Country selector: matching dropdown style
- Research filters: animated collapsible sections with count badges
- Blog cards: refined typography, staggered entry animations, hover lift
- Model page: postMessage iframe height listener

* Fix CI: prettier formatting, type error (fontWeight.normal), lint suppressions

* Fix lint: curly braces, unused vars, a11y button, prettier formatting

* Add same-origin iframe embed for Model page

Use Vercel rewrite to proxy policyengine-model.vercel.app via /_model-embed,
making the iframe same-origin so we can read contentDocument.scrollHeight
and auto-size the iframe to fit its content without scrollbars.

* Simplify Model page to use fixed height with postMessage fallback

Use a fixed 5200px height for both US and UK model pages instead of
polling contentDocument (which requires same-origin). Listen for
postMessage height updates from the embedded app's ResizeObserver.
Remove unused Vercel rewrite for /_model-embed.

* Fix Model page crash: use simple fixed-height iframe

Remove postMessage listener and ResizeObserver-driven resizing which
caused an infinite resize loop crashing Firefox. Use a simple 4000px
fixed height iframe instead.

* Restyle featured research banner to match header

Use the same teal gradient (primary[800] → primary[600]) as the header,
frosted-glass card treatments instead of opaque white cards, and a more
restrained typographic hierarchy. Remove dead countdown timer code for
the Nov 2025 budget event.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace org logos with infinite scrolling marquee carousel

Continuous horizontal scroll with CSS animation instead of the
slot-swapping fade approach. Logos start greyscale and desaturated,
colouring on hover. Edge fade masks for a clean look.

* Remove grayscale filter from org logos

commit.message:
Traits v2 Phase 2: compile-time constraint tracking

Track trait constraints on type variables through the typechecker so
that calls like `sort [(\x -> x)]` are rejected at compile time instead
of crashing at runtime. Constraints are inferred automatically from
trait method usage, propagated through function calls and module
boundaries, and checked when type variables resolve to concrete types.

Adds optional `Ord a => ...` annotation syntax for documenting and
enforcing constraints on type signatures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: separate photo storage from core import transaction (#30)

The import was storing bins, items, AND photo blobs in a single IndexedDB
transaction. If photo blob storage failed (quota, serialisation, iOS
Safari limitations), the entire transaction rolled back — leaving the
user with zero data despite a seemingly successful import.

Split into two transactions: bins+items first (critical), then photos
(best-effort). If photo storage fails, items are still preserved and
the user is notified that some photos could not be saved.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SHCiQrSmWhXaCWBeCDtRGJ
